query:
SELECT 
  r.full_name,
  r.email,
  r.team,
  r.access_type,
  r.payment_status,
  r.referral_code,
  gc.code AS group_code,
  gc.creator_id,
  gc.member_count,
  creator.full_name AS group_creator_name
FROM sports_day_registrations r
LEFT JOIN group_codes gc ON gc.creator_id = r.id
LEFT JOIN sports_day_registrations creator ON creator.id = gc.creator_id
WHERE UPPER(r.referral_code) = 'SD002UDX'
   OR UPPER(gc.code) = 'SD002UDX'
LIMIT 10;
